timeline.label: Extraordinary shareholder meeting (capital action context in IR archive)
Listed on TOKYO PRO Market (7176); Simplex Asset Management heritage since 1999

industry.structure: Japan ETF and institutional asset management is concentrated among global sponsors and domestic independents; Simplex competes on Japan-first active and thematic ETF products plus institutional mandates.
industry.share_shift: Simplex gained FY2026 base-fee revenue (+17.1%) faster than AUM (+2.9%), implying fee mix and performance-fee uplift; global ETF sponsors remain scale competitors.
industry.trend: Success fees dominated FY2026 fee stack (~65% of base+success); regulatory attention on leveraged/inverse products and market-beta cyclicality remain industry themes.
